# hiloop skills

> Open-source Agent Skills that teach AI agents to operate hiloop — isolated agent sandboxes with
> branchable, versioned workspaces and tree-native observability. The skills drive hiloop through
> the `hiloop` CLI and follow the open Agent Skills standard, so they work across harnesses.

## Start here

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): whole-product orientation — the interface, the always-in-order rules, the canonical end-to-end loop.

## Skills

- [authenticating](skills/authenticating/SKILL.md): sign in with hiloop login (default) or HILOOP_API_KEY (headless/CI), whoami, tenant scope, key management.
- [creating-sandboxes](skills/creating-sandboxes/SKILL.md): hiloop sandbox create / poll-ready / delete; projects, the required --profile-or---image choice, resources (cpus/memory/disk/GPUs), managed network + egress mode, capture, workspace attachment, idle-timeout / max-runtime, secret-binding caveats.
- [running-commands-in-a-sandbox](skills/running-commands-in-a-sandbox/SKILL.md): buffered `hiloop sandbox exec` (timeout ceiling, output caps, exit codes, idempotency keys), one-shot `hiloop sandbox run` (--rm/--wait), interactive `hiloop sandbox ssh` + port forwarding, moving files via /workspace, rsync, and execution artifacts.
- [persisting-and-branching-workspaces](skills/persisting-and-branching-workspaces/SKILL.md): attach a `branchfs:v1` workspace revision at create (--workspace-revision/--workspace-target); stop seals an immutable revision, resume restores it exactly (new runtime generation, processes gone); read the sealed revision from the stop result and boot N sandboxes from one revision.
- [assembling-a-personal-devbox](skills/assembling-a-personal-devbox/SKILL.md): a long-lived owner-only sandbox — managed-SSH profile + workspace revision + --no-idle-reclaim (or idle timeout), hiloop sandbox ssh, ssh-config print/install + rsync, access list/grant/revoke with --if-revision fencing, suspend-and-wake.
- [managing-secrets](skills/managing-secrets/SKILL.md): hiloop secret set/list/rotate/revoke + hiloop run --secret; a write-only credential a run uses but never sees; sandbox-side bindings currently fail closed.
- [coordinating-with-leases](skills/coordinating-with-leases/SKILL.md): hiloop lease acquire/renew/release — named, TTL-bounded, project-scoped mutual exclusion; acquire is a compare-and-set on `<project>/<name>` that exits 1 while a live holder exists (lease_held).
- [launching-as-workloads](skills/launching-as-workloads/SKILL.md): hiloop workloads create/list/show/delete/allow-launch + `--as workload/<name>` on hiloop run / hiloop sandbox create / hiloop sandbox run — named machine identities with kinded launch ACLs (restrict to users by id and/or service-account keys via allow-launch --user/--service-account); registration is explicit, launching as an unregistered name fails closed (not_found), and delete is owner/admin-only with a confirmation prompt (`--yes` to skip; live sandboxes conflict, past attribution keeps only the raw id).
- [querying-observability-trees](skills/querying-observability-trees/SKILL.md): capture a run with hiloop run (--net-capture modes, --no-otlp, --label), orient with runs list/tree/show/complete, query with read-only SQL (hiloop query) over the events table + views, lineage_path scoping, runs tail, events payload, run diffs by anti-join.
- [annotating-runs](skills/annotating-runs/SKILL.md): hiloop annotation-schema + hiloop annotations add (a run, an event, a time range, or a project); structured judgments you can filter and aggregate on via ann_<schema> views.
- [reporting-product-bugs](skills/reporting-product-bugs/SKILL.md): hiloop feedback (or POST /v1/feedback) — report a hiloop product bug with expected/actual/repro, evidence ids, severity, fingerprint dedup; product bugs and ideas, never task results.

## Reference

- [events SQL reference](skills/querying-observability-trees/references/events-sql.md): the read-only SQL query surface — the events table columns, query rules, example SELECTs.

## More

- hiloop docs: https://docs.hiloop.ai
- hiloop docs machine index: https://docs.hiloop.ai/llms.txt
